$description: Shadows tinted toward bg hue (H≈65°). Never pure gray. Never neon outer glows.

sm.$description: Subtle lift — nav pills, small glass elements

lg.$description: Floating panels, hero cards, hover state elevation

accent.$description: Copper glow — primary button at rest

glassTopEdge.$description: Glass top-edge highlight — simulates physical glass thickness

glassTopEdgeStrong.$description: Stronger glass top-edge for hero cards
